mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sch_calendar_event (user_id, title, description, start_time, end_time, event_type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{eventType})
INSERT INTO sch_task (title, description, assigner_id, assignee_id, due_date, priority, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{assignerId}, #{assigneeId}, #{dueDate}, #{priority}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sch_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sch_meeting (title, room_id, host_id, start_time, end_time, description, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{roomId}, #{hostId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sch_meeting WHERE start_time >= #{start} AND end_time <= #{end} ORDER BY start_time
